title: Landing page renders hero section and core navigation
description: Verifies the public landing page loads and shows the hero section and primary navigation elements.

title: Navigate from landing page header to login page
description: Verifies a user can reach the login page from the landing page using the header link.

steps.description: Click on "Đăng nhập" in the header

title: Upcoming family events preview displays on landing page
description: Verifies the upcoming family events preview section appears and shows event items when available.

steps.description: Verify element "Upcoming events section" is visible
Verify element "Upcoming events list" is visible

title: Upcoming events shows a loading state while fetching data
description: Verifies the landing page shows a visible loading state for upcoming events during initial fetch.

steps.description: Verify element "Upcoming events loading indicator" is visible
Wait for element "Upcoming events list" to appear
Verify element "Upcoming events list" is visible

title: Graceful empty state when no upcoming events exist
description: Verifies the landing page shows a clear empty state message if there are no upcoming events to display.

steps.description: Verify element "Upcoming events section" is visible
Verify element "Upcoming events list" is not visible

title: Header navigation links to public sections from landing page
description: Verifies the user can navigate from the landing page header to a public page and see it loaded.

steps.description: Click on "Giới thiệu" in the header
Verify element "About page content" is visible

title: View members and toggle between list, tree, and mindmap modes
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Members page and switch between view modes while seeing member content.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click the view mode toggle for "Cây" (Tree) view
Verify element "Cây gia phả" (family tree) is visible

title: Search members by name and open a member details page from results
description: Verifies search/filter narrows the members list and a user can open a member detail page from the filtered results.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Type "a" into the member search field
Click on the first member shown in the filtered results

title: Edit an existing member profile and save changes
description: Verifies an authenticated user can edit a member, change basic fields, save, and see updated details.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Type " (đã sửa)" into the Họ và tên (Full name) field

title: Add rich-text notes for a member and verify notes appear after saving
description: Verifies Tiptap rich-text notes can be entered and are visible after saving member changes.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click into the Ghi chú (Notes) rich text editor area
Type "Ghi chú kiểm thử" into the notes editor

title: Create a new member and verify it appears in the members list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new member and see the new record in the members list.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click the "Tạo thành viên mới" (Create New Member) button
Type "Thành viên kiểm thử" into the Họ và tên (Full name) field

title: Attempt to save a new member with missing required name and see validation message
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents saving when key fields are missing and shows a visible error message.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click the "Tạo thành viên mới" (Create New Member) button

title: Delete member is blocked when relationships exist and user cancels deletion
description: Verifies deletion integrity check shows an error instructing to remove relationships first, and cancel keeps the member intact.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Verify text "xóa các mối quan hệ" (remove relationships) is visible

title: Switch to mindmap view and open a member from the visualization
description: Verifies mindmap mode renders and user can open a member detail by selecting a person card/node.

steps.description: Click the "Thành viên" (Members) item in the dashboard navigation
Click the view mode toggle for "Mindmap" view
Verify element "Sơ đồ tư duy" (mindmap) is visible
Click on a person card/node in the mindmap visualization

title: Add a spouse relationship successfully from a member detail page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can add a spouse relationship and see it reflected on the member detail view.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click the relationship type option for "Vợ/Chồng" (Spouse)
Click into the person search field
Type "a" into the person search field
Click the first person result in the search results

title: Add a parent-child relationship successfully from a member detail page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can add a parent-child relationship and see it reflected on the member detail view.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click the relationship type option for "Cha/Mẹ - Con" (Parent-Child)
Click into the person search field
Type "a" into the person search field
Click the first person result in the search results
Verify text "Cha" or "Mẹ" or "Con" is visible

title: Add a sibling relationship successfully from a member detail page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can add a sibling relationship and see it reflected on the member detail view.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click the relationship type option for "Anh/Chị/Em" (Sibling)
Click into the person search field
Type "a" into the person search field
Click the first person result in the search results
Verify text "Anh" or "Chị" or "Em" is visible

title: Prevent adding a duplicate relationship (duplicate constraint error)
description: Verifies that attempting to add a relationship that already exists shows a visible duplicate error message and does not add a second entry.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Scroll to the relationships section on the member detail page
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click the relationship type that matches an existing relationship shown in the relationships list
Click into the person search field
Type "a" into the person search field
Click the same person that is already listed in the existing relationship
Verify text "đã tồn tại" (already exists) is visible

title: Remove an existing relationship successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated user can remove an existing relationship and the relationship is no longer visible on the member detail page.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Scroll to the relationships section on the member detail page
Click the "Xóa" (Remove/Delete) control for the first relationship in the list
Verify text "Đã xóa" (Deleted) or "Xóa thành công" (Delete successful) is visible
Verify the removed relationship entry is not visible in the relationships list

title: Relationship person selector returns results for a common search term
description: Verifies the searchable person selector shows a visible list of matching people when the user types a query.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click into the person search field
Type "a" into the person search field
Verify element "person search results" is visible
Verify at least one person result row is visible

title: Prevent saving a relationship when no person is selected
description: Verifies the Save action is blocked and a visible validation message appears if the user does not select any person for the relationship.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click the relationship type option for "Vợ/Chồng" (Spouse)
Verify text "Vui lòng chọn" (Please select) is visible

title: Prevent saving a relationship when relationship type is not selected
description: Verifies the Save action is blocked and a visible validation message appears if the user selects a person but does not choose a relationship type.

steps.description: Click "Thành viên" (Members) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first member in the members list
Click the "Thêm mối quan hệ" (Add Relationship) button
Click into the person search field
Type "a" into the person search field
Click the first person result in the search results
Verify text "Chọn loại quan hệ" (Select relationship type) is visible

title: View upcoming events list sorted by next occurrence
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Events page and see the upcoming events list in a sensible upcoming order.

steps.description: Click on the "Sự kiện" (Events) item in the dashboard navigation

title: Create a new custom event and confirm it appears in the list
description: Verifies the user can create a custom event with valid data and see it displayed in the events list.

steps.description: Click on the "Sự kiện" (Events) item in the dashboard navigation
Click the "Tạo sự kiện" / "Tạo sự kiện tùy chỉnh" (Create custom event) button
Verify text "Tạo sự kiện" (Create event) is visible

title: Save a custom event with all fields populated
description: Verifies the custom event modal/form accepts valid inputs for name, date, location, and content and saves successfully.

steps.description: Click on the "Sự kiện" (Events) item in the dashboard navigation
Click the "Tạo sự kiện" / "Tạo sự kiện tùy chỉnh" (Create custom event) button
Type "Giỗ họ - Kiểm thử" into the event name field
Type "2030-01-15" into the event date field

title: Prevent import when no file is selected
description: Verifies the import confirm action is blocked or shows a validation message if no JSON file is selected.

steps.description: Click on "Dữ liệu" (Data) in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Vui lòng chọn tệp" (Please select a file) is visible

title: Admin creates a new user and sees it in the users list
description: Verifies an admin can create a new user with a selected role and the new user appears in the list.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click "Create New User" (Tạo người dùng mới)

title: Admin completes user creation form successfully
description: Verifies the create user form accepts valid inputs and returns to a list where the created user is visible.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click "Create New User" (Tạo người dùng mới)

title: Admin selects role and submits create user, then verifies user appears
description: Verifies the admin can choose a role, create the user, and confirm the new email is shown in the list with the chosen role.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click "Create New User" (Tạo người dùng mới)

title: Admin changes an existing user's role to editor and saves
description: Verifies an admin can open a user row, change role to editor, save, and see the updated role in the list.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click on a user row in the list (not yourself)

title: Admin toggles a user's active status and sees status change
description: Verifies an admin can deactivate or reactivate a user and the list shows the updated active status.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click the active status toggle for a user (not yourself)
Verify text "inactive" or "không hoạt động" is visible

title: Admin deletes a user and verifies it disappears from the list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a user and the user is no longer visible in the users list afterward.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click the "Delete" (Xóa) action for a user that is not yourself
Click the "Confirm" (Xác nhận) button in the delete confirmation UI
Verify text "Deleted" or "Đã xóa" is visible

title: Admin cannot delete their own account (safeguard)
description: Verifies the UI prevents an admin from deleting their own user account and shows an error or disabled control.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Click on the user row corresponding to the currently logged-in account
Verify element "Delete" (Xóa) control is not visible or is disabled
Verify text "cannot delete yourself" or "không thể tự xóa" is visible

title: Non-admin sees restricted access message when visiting User Management
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot use the user management interface and sees a permission denied/restricted message.

steps.description: Click "Users" (Quản lý người dùng) in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "permission denied" or "không có quyền" is visible
Verify element "Create New User" (Tạo người dùng mới) is not visible

title: Create and publish a new blog post (text-only) and see it in the admin list
description: Verifies an admin can create a new blog post, publish it, save successfully, and see it listed in the admin blog list.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on the "Tạo bài viết mới" (Create new blog post) button
Type "Bài viết kiểm thử tự động" into the Title field
Click into the rich-text editor content area
Type "Nội dung bài viết kiểm thử. Đây là đoạn văn mẫu." into the editor
Select "Published" (or the Vietnamese equivalent) from the Status dropdown
Verify text "Bài viết kiểm thử tự động" is visible

title: Create and save a new blog post as Draft and verify it appears in admin list
description: Verifies an admin can create a new blog post, set it as draft, save, and see it listed with draft status indicator.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on the "Tạo bài viết mới" (Create new blog post) button
Type "Bài viết nháp kiểm thử" into the Title field
Click into the rich-text editor content area
Type "Nội dung nháp để kiểm thử trạng thái." into the editor
Select "Draft" (or the Vietnamese equivalent) from the Status dropdown
Verify text "Bài viết nháp kiểm thử" is visible

title: Edit an existing blog post content and verify changes are reflected in admin list
description: Verifies an admin can open an existing post from the list, update its content, save, and return to the list successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on the first blog post in the admin list
Click into the rich-text editor content area

Type "
Cập nhật nội dung: thêm đoạn kiểm thử." into the editor
Verify element "Blog posts list" is visible

title: Attempt to save a new post with empty title and verify validation prevents saving/publishing
description: Verifies validation triggers when the title is missing and prevents saving/publishing a new blog post.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on the "Tạo bài viết mới" (Create new blog post) button
Click into the rich-text editor content area
Type "Nội dung có nhưng thiếu tiêu đề." into the editor

title: Toggle status from Draft to Published for an existing post and save
description: Verifies an admin can change an existing post status and save successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on a blog post that appears to be in Draft status
Select "Published" (or the Vietnamese equivalent) from the Status dropdown
Verify element "Blog posts list" is visible

title: Verify public blog listing shows a published post
description: Verifies that a published post managed in admin is visible on the public /blog page.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the dashboard navigation/menu
Verify element "Blog posts list" is visible
Click on the site header logo or "Trang chủ" (Home) link
Click on "Blog" in the public site navigation/menu
Verify at least one blog post title is visible

title: Find kinship between two connected members and display term + path
description: Verifies a user can select two different connected members and see the Vietnamese kinship term plus the relationship path/description.

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Select an option from the first person selector (Person 1)
Select a different option from the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Relationship path" (path/result section) is visible
Verify element "Vietnamese kinship term" (kinship term result) is visible

title: Validation when selecting the same person for both selectors
description: Verifies the UI blocks searching when the same member is chosen twice and shows an instruction to select two different people.

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Select an option from the first person selector (Person 1)
Select the same person option in the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify text "Chọn hai người khác nhau" (Select two different people) is visible

title: No relationship found for two unconnected members
description: Verifies the UI shows a 'No relationship found' state when two selected members have no relationship path in the data.

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Select an option from the first person selector (Person 1) that is expected to be unconnected to the second choice
Select an option from the second person selector (Person 2) that is expected to be unconnected to the first choice
Verify text "Không tìm thấy quan hệ" (No relationship found) is visible

title: Search button disabled or blocked until both people are selected
description: Verifies the user cannot run a search until both selectors have valid selections, and the UI clearly indicates this state.

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Find relationship" button is visible
Verify text "Vui lòng chọn" (Please select) is visible

title: Results update when changing one person and searching again
description: Verifies changing one selected member and rerunning the search updates the displayed relationship term/path.

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Select an option from the first person selector (Person 1)
Select an option from the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Relationship path" (path/result section) is visible
Select a different option from the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Vietnamese kinship term" (kinship term result) is visible

title: Swap the two selected people and confirm a valid result still displays
description: Verifies that reversing Person 1 and Person 2 and searching produces a visible kinship result (term/path section shown).

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Select an option from the first person selector (Person 1)
Select a different option from the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Vietnamese kinship term" (kinship term result) is visible
Select the previous Person 2 option in the first person selector (Person 1)
Select the previous Person 1 option in the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Relationship path" (path/result section) is visible

title: Clear and reselect people after a successful search
description: Verifies the user can change selections after results are shown and the page remains usable without stale/overlapping results.

steps.description: Click on the "Danh xưng" or "Quan hệ" (Kinship) item in the dashboard navigation
Select an option from the first person selector (Person 1)
Select a different option from the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Relationship path" (path/result section) is visible
Select a different option from the first person selector (Person 1)
Select a different option from the second person selector (Person 2)
Verify element "Vietnamese kinship term" (kinship term result) is visible

title: View lineage branches list on Lineage page after login
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can reach Lineage Management and see the lineage branches section/list.

steps.description: Click on "Lineage" / "Dòng họ" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Dòng họ" or "Lineage" is visible

title: Select a lineage root and see generation breakdown
description: Verifies selecting a lineage root updates the view to show a generation breakdown for that root.

steps.description: Click on "Lineage" / "Dòng họ" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Lineage branches" section is visible
Click on the first visible lineage root option in the lineage branches list
Verify element "Generation" / "Thế hệ" breakdown section is visible

title: Switch lineage root selection updates generation breakdown
description: Verifies changing the selected lineage root changes the visible generation breakdown content.

steps.description: Click on "Lineage" / "Dòng họ" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first visible lineage root option in the lineage branches list
Verify element "Generation" / "Thế hệ" breakdown section is visible
Click on a different visible lineage root option in the lineage branches list

title: Lineage page displays a clear prompt when no lineage root is selected
description: Verifies the UI guides the user to select a lineage root before showing generation details.

steps.description: Click on "Lineage" / "Dòng họ" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text prompting selection such as "Chọn" / "Vui lòng chọn" is visible

title: Generation breakdown remains visible after scrolling the lineage page
description: Verifies that the generation breakdown section is still accessible/visible after the user scrolls the page.

steps.description: Click on "Lineage" / "Dòng họ" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first visible lineage root option in the lineage branches list
Scroll to the bottom of the lineage page

title: Open Family Statistics dashboard and see core charts and summary cards
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the statistics page and view the main dashboard content (charts/cards).

steps.description: Click on "Thống kê" in the dashboard navigation

title: View generation distribution section on Family Statistics
description: Verifies that the generation distribution section is visible on the statistics dashboard.

steps.description: Click on "Thống kê" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Biểu đồ phân bố thế hệ" is visible

title: View gender breakdown section on Family Statistics
description: Verifies that the gender breakdown section is visible on the statistics dashboard.

steps.description: Click on "Thống kê" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Biểu đồ giới tính" is visible

title: Loading state appears before statistics render
description: Verifies that a visible loading state is shown while statistics data is being fetched.

steps.description: Click on "Thống kê" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Bảng thống kê" is visible

title: Age analytics section is visible on Family Statistics
description: Verifies that age-related analytics content (age chart/summary) is present on the statistics dashboard.

steps.description: Click on "Thống kê" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Biểu đồ độ tuổi" is visible

title: Refresh statistics view using in-page refresh/retry control
description: Verifies that the user can retry/refresh the statistics content from within the stats page (if a refresh/retry control is present).

steps.description: Click on "Thống kê" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the "Tải lại" or "Thử lại" button

title: Open Public Blog listing page and see published posts
description: Verifies the public blog listing page loads and shows a visible list of published posts without requiring login.

steps.description: Verify element "Blog post listing" is visible
Verify element "A blog post card/item in the list" is visible

title: Open a blog post from listing and read full content
description: Verifies a user can open an individual blog post from the public listing and see full content on the post page.

steps.description: Verify element "A blog post card/item in the list" is visible
Click on the first visible blog post in the listing
Verify element "Blog post title" is visible
Verify element "Blog post content" is visible

title: Navigate between posts using in-post navigation
description: Verifies the user can move to another blog post from within a blog post page using visible navigation elements.

steps.description: Click on the first visible blog post in the listing
Verify element "Blog post title" is visible
Click on "Next post" (or an equivalent in-post navigation link)
Verify element "Blog post title" is visible

title: Return from a blog post back to the blog listing via UI link
description: Verifies the user can return to the blog listing from an individual blog post page using a visible UI control.

steps.description: Click on the first visible blog post in the listing
Click on "Back to Blog" (or the Blog link in the header/navigation)
Verify element "Blog post listing" is visible

title: Access a non-existent blog slug directly shows not found state
description: Verifies navigating to an invalid blog post URL displays a visible 404/not-found message instead of a broken page.

steps.description: Verify text "Không tìm thấy" is visible
Verify element "Not found / 404 state" is visible

title: Blog listing remains accessible without authentication from the landing page
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user can reach the public blog listing using site navigation from the landing page.

steps.description: Click on "Blog" in the site header/navigation
Verify element "Blog post listing" is visible
